title: Restore the 0.6.14 hosted-working player core
summary: 0.6.22 stops pushing forward on the broken later player-core line and restores the last hosted-working 0.6.14 core under the current raw modern_tv dev_deploy seam.
changes: Restore FASyncRuntime.cs, FASyncRuntime.Player.cs, FASyncRuntime.PlayerHosted.cs, and FASyncRuntime.PlayerPresets.cs to the 0.6.14 hosted-working state.
Keep the current raw modern_tv hosted proof lane and baseline direct-player raw asset deployment pattern.
Stamp version 0.6.22 into player.version.json and BuildRuntimeInfo.cs.
Build and redeploy the 0.6.22 raw modern_tv dev_deploy proof seam and the matching baseline direct-player raw asset.
reasoning: The later player-core slices did not improve the basics in live testing; load, next, scrub, and movie playback all regressed again.
The last known hosted-working seam in this repo is 0.6.14, which already had the modern_tv proof, the autoplay and preset-default fixes, and the safe plugin UI readback slice.
The boring fix is to restore that known-good core instead of adding another forward-layered repair.
operatorVisibleOutcomes: Hosted image and movie loads should return to the 0.6.14 control and playback behavior.
Next, Play/Pause, scrub, and movie playback should stop following the broken later line.
This is a rollback recovery slice, not a new feature slice.
knownIssues: Any later player-core experiments from 0.6.15 through 0.6.21 are intentionally not carried in this rollback slice.
The raw modern_tv proof seam remains the only live authority for this version; package inventory stays build-only unless distributed:true and the exact .var exists in AddonPackages.
